summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4-column Kanban board with Approval column. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - 4 columns present (Open, In Progress, Approval, Completed), contextual status buttons work, status transitions work correctly, summary badges show all 4 statuses, priority labels shown on HIGH priority tasks.
passed_tests: Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id/status accepts 'open' as valid status
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id/status accepts 'in_progress' as valid status
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id/status accepts 'approval' as valid status (NEW)
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id/status accepts 'completed' as valid status
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id/status with 'completed' sets completed_at timestamp
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id/status with 'open' clears completed_at
Backend: Invalid status returns 400
Backend: 'archived' status returns 400 (only set by background task)
Backend: GET /api/v1/tasks excludes archived tasks by default
Backend: GET /api/v1/tasks?include_archived=true includes archived tasks
Backend: GET /api/v1/tasks?status=open filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/v1/tasks?status=in_progress filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/v1/tasks?status=approval filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/v1/tasks?status=completed filters correctly
Backend: Full Kanban flow Open -> In Progress -> Approval -> Completed works
Backend: Completed -> Open transition works and clears completed_at
Backend: Approval -> In Progress transition works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/v1/stats works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/v1/brands works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/v1/approvals works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/v1/activity works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/v1/inboxes works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/v1/agents works
Frontend: Kanban has exactly 4 columns: Open, In Progress, Approval, Completed
Frontend: kanban-column-approval exists with data-testid
Frontend: Cards show contextual status buttons (Open card has In Progress, Approval, Done)
Frontend: Moving task to Approval column works via button click
Frontend: Moving task from Approval to Completed works
Frontend: Moving task from Completed back to Open works
Frontend: Summary badges at top show counts for all 4 statuses
Frontend: Priority labels shown on HIGH priority tasks (10 found)
Regression: Overview loads stats correctly (PENDING APPROVALS, OPEN TASKS, PENDING EMAILS)
Regression: All views work (Approvals, Inboxes, Schedule, Calendar, Activity)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed tasks during testing for status transition tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4-column Kanban board fully tested and working. Columns: Open, In Progress, Approval (NEW), Completed. Status validation includes 'approval'. completed_at timestamp is set when status changes to 'completed' and cleared when changed to other statuses. Archived tasks are excluded from default GET /tasks response. Auto-archive background task runs every hour (not testable during testing session). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_kanban_approval_column.py covers all status validation, archived exclusion, and regression tests.
